productDisplayName: Nike Women White Double Team Lite Casual Shoes
description: Style NoteStylish to a T and comfortable for the feet, the nike womens Double Team Lite shoe looks absolutely classy with the wrap around swoosh branding. Good for those casual walks, it makes for a perfect casual footwear.Product DetailsSynthetic leather upper with toe box lining and heel cup overlays for durability and structureWrap around swoosh branding on the sides with a patent trim on the tongue and branding on the heel cupPerforated toe box for ventilation and dry comfortNylon, padded sockliner for dry in-step comfortMildly padded tongue with synthetic twill lace-up system for snug FitEVA midsole for durability and lightweight comfortMildly padded sockliner for impact protectionTPR outsole for durabilityHerringbone tread pattern for traction and gripWarranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount)nbsp;Material and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in sunlightWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
